div.t-att-class: 'form-preview-wrapper form-id-%s d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center min-vh-100 bg-gradient' % form.id

button.class: btn btn-primary px-4 py-2 rounded-pill w-100 form-submit-button

div.t-att-class: 'd-flex flex-wrap gap-2' if field.checkbox_layout == 'horizontal' else ('d-flex flex-wrap gap-3' if field.checkbox_layout == 'inline' else 'd-block')
div.t-att-style: 'display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px;' if field.checkbox_layout == 'horizontal' else ('display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;' if field.checkbox_layout == 'inline' else 'display: block;')

span.style: cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.8rem; color: #ddd; user-select: none; margin-right:10px;
cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.8rem; color: #ddd; user-select: none; margin-right:10px;
cursor: pointer; font-size: 1.8rem; color: #ddd; user-select: none; font-weight: bold; margin-right:10px;

option.t-att-selected: field.address_default_country and field.address_default_country.id == country.id and 'selected' or None

button.style: position:absolute !important; right:12px !important; top:50% !important; transform:translateY(-50%) !important; border:none !important; background:transparent !important; z-index:9999 !important; padding:0 !important;

t.t-if: form.send_to_customer and form.email_notifications_enabled and not form.require_email_consent

t.t-esc: form.consent_text or 'Send me a confirmation email'

div.div: Check this box if you want to receive a confirmation email.
